a.xlink:title: Implementation of cross-matrix correlation computation for HDF5 matrices - OPTIMIZED.
Enhanced HDF5 cross-correlation with integrated transpose support for big-omics.
Optimized p-value computation for correlation matrices using Eigen.
Create a new dataset with optional compression.
Inherit the compression level from an input dataset if not already set.
Compute p-value for correlation coefficient using t-distribution.
Add an attribute to the dataset.
Checks if an HDF5 element (group or dataset) exists.
Removes multiple elements from an HDF5 file.
Checks if a path exists in an HDF5 file.
